sglang.title: Warn users when release_memory_occupation is called without memory saver enabled
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Originally this was not a problem because torch_memory_saver was mandatory. But later it becomes optional, and users get confused by why release_memory_occupation does not save memory without realizing the ServerArgs.enable_memory_saver should be enabled, thus this tiny PR.

Modifications

sglang.title: fix(typo): fix `reply` to `replay` in `base_attn_backend.py`
sglang.author: Thysrael
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Identified a spelling error in python/sglang/srt/layers/attention/base_attn_backend.py where replay was incorrectly written as reply.
Modifications
I changed reply to replay and checked all other occurrences of reply in the project, confirming there were no additional misspellings of rep

sglang.title: Support recording experts workload in QWen2-MoE
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Our jupyter notebook uses a QWen2-MoE model to demonstrate how to record experts' workload. Unfortunately, this feature was not supported for this model. Therefore, the layer_ids of output were always "UNKNOWN". This PR fixes this issue by supporting recording experts workload in QWen2-Mo

sglang.title: Fix popen_launch_server wait for 20 minutes when child process exits
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Now it immediately exists instead.

Modifications

Checklist

 Format your code according to the Code Formatting with Pre-Commit.
 Add unit tests as outlined in the Running Unit Tests.
 Update documentation / docstrings / example tutorials as needed, according to Writing Documentation.
 P

sglang.title: Use metadata to detect version of package
sglang.author: kebe7jun

sglang.title: Fix shared memory OOM on sm86 GPUs.
sglang.author: Conless
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR fixes #3451, which reports a shared memory OOM issue on A40 (I think this also happens on other sm86 GPUs like RTX 3090) due to incorrect Triton kernel configuration. The root cause is that sm86/sm89 GPUs have a smaller shared memory limit compared to sm80 (e.g., A100).
A similar

vllm.title: [Feature] Enhance EAGLE Architecture with Proper RMS Norms
vllm.author: luyuzhe111
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In this PR, we allow the EAGLE architecture to optionally use proper RMS normalizations similar to the DeepSeek MTP module. It has two main benefits.

It improves acceptance length by ~5% when pre-attention norm, the output norm, and parallel norms (highlighted in red in the diagram below, taken fro

vllm.title: [FEAT][ROCm] Integrate Fused MoE Kernels from AITER
vllm.author: vllmellm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR integrates fused MoE kernels from AITER (AI Tensor Engine for ROCm)
Several fused MoE kernels have been integrated for different scenarios:


The ck_moe kernel from AITER is integrated for unquantized model weights. It is enabled by default when VLLM_ROCM_USE_AITER=1 is set. It can be specif

vllm.title: Separate base model from `TransformersModel`
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Splits TransformersModel into:

Base class - TransformersModel
LM class - TransformersForCausalLM

This base class can be reused for VLM support by #13754.

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix all issues reported by torchfix.

vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: If model doesn't support TP but user isn't requesting it, we can leave the linear layers alone.

vllm.title: [Model] Add Reasoning Parser for Granite Models
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds a reasoning parser for Granite 3.2 models! These models have an optional chat template kwarg thinking that changes the system prompt to enable reasoning. 😄
The format of the text is expected to be:
Here is my thought process: <reasoning_content> Here is my response: <content>

There hav

vllm.title: multi-node offline DP+EP example
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
to make it easy to run multi-node DP+EP.
I have verified that the following command works:
# node 0
python examples/offline_inference/data_parallel.py --node-size 2 --node-rank 0 --master-addr 10.99.48.128 --master-port 13345
# node 1
python examples/offline_inference/data_parallel.py --node-size 2

vllm.title: Fix weight loading for some models in Transformers backend
vllm.author: hmellor
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Use model as the prefix instead of base_model_prefix because the model attribute in vLLM is always model.

vllm.author: aarnphm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR remove the assertion on the job for create the grammar asynchronously, given that we already check for backend not to be None.
Signed-off-by: Aaron Pham contact@aarnphm.xyz

vllm.title: [V1][Sampler] Faster top-k only implementation
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When there's top-k in the batch but no top-p.
For 128k vocab, 1024 batch size, 500 ops on A100, where max top k is 10:
Before: 11.571 sec
After: 2.136 sec

vllm.title: Support SHA256 as hash function in prefix caching
vllm.author: dr75
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Context
Prefix-caching may access blocks from unrelated requests due to hash collision. If there is a large number of blocks in the cache (e.g., 20k), a hash collision is rare but can happen. Also, as hash() is used, this could potentially be exploited.
Suggested change
To fix this, I want to replac

vllm.author: Alexei-V-Ivanov-AMD

Applying some fixes for K8s agents in CI.

vllm.title: [V1] TPU - Revert to exponential padding by default
vllm.author: alexm-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We have found a correctness issue with padding_gap == 64. As a temporary fix, this PR ensures that the default padding for now is exponential (as it was before).

vllm.title: [TPU] support disabling xla compilation cache
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The PyTorch/XLA compilation cache uses the Torch IR to generate keys. Consequently, changes in optimization flags, which affect compilation results, don't change the cache key. This can result in the wrong compilation being used. To prevent this, disabling the XLA compilation cache during developmen

vllm.title: Support FIPS enabled machines with MD5 hashing
vllm.author: MattTheCuber
vllm.bodyExcerpt: FIPS enabled machines prohibit MD5 hashing for security reasons. Using hashlib.md5 in Python will throw the error ValueError: [digital envelope routines] unsupported. There are typically 2 resolutions to this problem: use the usedforsecrutiy=False flag or use SHA1 hashing. The usedforsecurity flag i

vllm.title: [V1] Refactor num_computed_tokens logic
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
A prerequisite PR to enable the capability of contituning scheduling prefill chunks in PP.
This PR achieves the following flow:

At .schedule(), we advance num_computed_tokens right after scheduling a batch, so that in the case of chunked prefill, we could continue scheduling the next chunk (not cov

vllm.title: Allow torchao quantization in SiglipMLP
vllm.author: jerryzh168
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary:
SiglipMLP is not quantized by default, so when we try to load a torchao quantized model it doesn't work because the mlps are not quantized, this PR enables quantization when we are loading a torchao quantized checkpoint.
Depends on #14231
Test Plan:
python benchmarks/benchmark_latency.py --

vllm.title: [ROCm] Env variable to trigger custom PA
vllm.author: gshtras
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Returning the trigger env for the custom PA that got lost during upstreaming of this kernel
This would allow to force disable custom PA kernel and fall back to the default implementation

vllm.title: [TPU] [V1] fix cases when max_num_reqs is set smaller than MIN_NUM_SEQS
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
fix cases when max_num_reqs is set smaller than MIN_NUM_SEQS
change the temperature to 0 in examples/offline_inference/tpu.py, or it cannot generate expected reponses.

vllm.title: [Misc] Restrict ray version dependency and update PP feature warning in V1
vllm.author: ruisearch42
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Restrict ray versions because 2.44 has a regression: ray-project/ray#51596
Separate from above issue, this PR also updates PP feature warning if used in V1:

For Ray distributed backend, it defaults to V1 and shows no warning
For MP, it shows warning and falls back to V0

vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat

follow on to @ElizaWszola's CUTLASS FP8 Grouped GEMM
